ruleContent:
<js>
result=decodeURIComponent(result.match(/strencode2\("(.*?)"\)/)[1]).match(/src='(.*?)'/)[1];
`<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,minimum-scale=1,maximum-scale=1,user-scalable=no" />
{{@@title@all}}
</head>
<body>
<video src="${result}" poster="{{@@video@poster}}" width="100%" height="auto" controls="controls" ></video>
{{@@#videodetails.0@h4@all}}
</body>
</html>`
</js>
